regions.notes: 7% general. Reduced rates available for primary residence (6% up to €150k; 3.5% up to €150k for under 35 or special conditions).
Progressive scale 8–10% depending on price. 60% bonus for families in rural areas.
Progressive scale 8–10%. Reduced 4–6% for rural areas and young buyers (up to 35). 3% for protected housing.
Progressive scale 8–13%. Reduced rates: 4% for primary residence (≤€270k), 2% for under 36, disabled, or family.
6.5% general. 5% for primary residence (base ≤€200k, €300k for family, €400k for special family). 1% for families, disabled, monoparental, victims of violence, under 40.
9% general. 7% for primary residence (value <€200k). 4% for family, monoparental, under 36, or disabled. 5% for rehabilitation. 3% for young entrepreneurs.
9% general. 6% for first primary residence (value ≤€180k). 5% for under 36, disabled, family, monoparental (value ≤€180k). 5–3% in depopulation-risk municipalities.
Progressive 8–10%. 4% for family, disabled (≥65%), under 36, or protected housing. 0.01% for under 36 + first residence + rural (<10k hab) + value ≤€150k.

Progressive scale 10–13% (since 27.06.2025). 20% for large tenants or bulk building acquisitions. 5% for VPO, family, monoparental, disabled, under 35, violence victims. 4% for rural primary residence (20.08.2025–16.07.2029). 3% for special rural areas.

10% until 31.05.2026, then 9% (over €1M always 11%). 4% for primary residence from 30.06.2026. 4% for family, monoparental, disabled, violence victims (value >€180k); 3% if ≤€180k. 6% for under 35 (value ≤€180k).
Progressive scale 8–11%. 7% for primary residence (value ≤€200k, as of 08.04.2025). 6% for business/professional use. 4% for VPO or rural primary residence.
8% general. 7% for primary residence. 6% for rural area primary residence. 4% for rural primary residence with rehabilitation. 100% deduction for disabled, family, under 36 in rural areas.
6% general. 4% for family (under certain conditions). 10% deduction for primary residence (value ≤€250k). 2% for real estate company transfers.
8% general. 5% for young entrepreneurs under 40. 4% for VPO. 3% for family, under 40, or disabled (≥65%).
6% general. 5% for family with 2+ children (base ≤€180.3k) purchasing primary residence.
7% general. 4% for residential property. 2.5% for family with 2+ children (primary residence) in Bizkaia.
7% general. 5% for VPO and family. 3% for VPO and family. 4% for under 40 + first primary residence (as of 03.03.2025). 3% if in depopulation-risk municipality.
